backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: Phase 1 complete — all 7 milestones met (M1-M7). No further changes pending. PR merge sequence: #10 (M1+M2) → #11 (M3) → #12 (M4) → #13 (M5+M7) → #14 (M6). Rebase each PR onto main as the previous one merges.

phase_progress: 7/7 milestones done (M1, M2, M3, M4, M5, M6, M7). Phase 1 COMPLETE.
